debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
hn : 100 ≤ n
S : Finset ℕ
hS : S ⊆ Finset.Icc n (2 * n)
⊢ (∃ a ∈ S, ∃ b ∈ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b)) ∨
    ∃ a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S, ∃ b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S, a ≠ b ∧ IsSquare (a + b)

failed_attempts:
let k := (n + 1).sqrt
  have hk : 10 ≤ k := Nat.le_sqrt.mpr (by linarith)
  let m := k - 2
  have hm : 8 ≤ m := by zify at hk ⊢; linarith
  let a := 2 * m ^ 2 - 2
  let b := 2 * m ^ 2 + 4 * m + 3
  let c := 2 * m ^ 2 + 8 * m + 6
  have ha_b : IsSquare (a + b) := by use 2 * m + 1; ring
  have hb_c : IsSquare (b + c) := by use 2 * m + 3; ring
  have hc_a : IsSquare (c + a) := by use 2 * m + 2; ring
  have hab : a < b := by linarith
  have hbc : b < c := by linarith
  have h_bound : {a, b, c} ⊆ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) := by
    simp only [Finset.subset_iff, Finset.mem_insert, Finset.mem_singleton, forall_eq_or_imp,
      Finset.mem_Icc]
    have h1 : (m + 2) ^ 2 ≤ n + 1 := Nat.sqrt_le (n + 1)
    have h2 : n + 1 < (m + 3) ^ 2 := Nat.lt_succ_sqrt (n + 1)
    have c_le : c ≤ 2 * n := by nlinarith
    have le_a : n ≤ a := by
      have : (m + 3) ^ 2 ≤ a + 1 + 1 := by nlinarith
      linarith
    refine ⟨⟨le_a, by linarith⟩, ⟨by linarith, by linarith⟩, ⟨by linarith, c_le⟩⟩
  by_cases h : ∃ x ∈ S, ∃ y ∈ S, x ≠ y ∧ IsSquare (x + y)
  · left; exact h
  · right
    push_neg at h
    have nm_ab : ¬(a ∈ S ∧ b ∈ S) := fun ⟨ha, hb⟩ ↦ h a ha b hb (by linarith) ha_b
    have nm_bc : ¬(b ∈ S ∧ c ∈ S) := fun ⟨hb, hc⟩ ↦ h b hb c hc (by linarith) hb_c
    have nm_ca : ¬(c ∈ S ∧ a ∈ S) := fun ⟨hc, ha⟩ ↦ h c hc a ha (by linarith) hc_a
    have mem : a ∈ S ∨ a ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S := 
      if ha : a ∈ S then Or.inl ha else Or.inr (Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨h_bound (by simp), ha⟩)
    have mem_b : b ∈ S ∨ b ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S := 
      if hb : b ∈ S then Or.inl hb else Or.inr (Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨h_bound (by simp), hb⟩)
    have mem_c : c ∈ S ∨ c ∈ Finset.Icc n (2 * n) \ S := 
      if hc : c ∈ S then Or.inl hc else Or.inr (Finset.mem_sdiff.mpr ⟨h_bound (by simp), hc⟩)
    rcases mem with ha | ha <;> rcases mem_b with hb | hb <;> rcases mem_c with hc | hc
    all_goals try { contradiction }
    · exact ⟨b, hb, c, hc, by linarith, hb_c⟩
    · exact ⟨a, ha, c, hc, by linarith, hc_a⟩
    · exact ⟨a, ha, b, hb, by linarith, ha_b⟩
    · exact ⟨a, ha, b, hb, by linarith, ha_b⟩
